opening_complaint.verbatim_patient_text: My right leg has been huge and heavy for years, but today a patch of skin turned bright red, hot, and extremely painful.
opening_complaint.stated_reason_for_presenting_today: A new red, hot, painful patch on the chronically swollen right leg that came on over the last day, with a mild fever.

symptom_narrative.onset: chronic swelling for 5 years; the new red painful patch came on over the last 24 hours
symptom_narrative.duration: years of progressive swelling; 24 hours of a new hot red tender area on the shin
symptom_narrative.character: the leg is heavy and dull-aching; the new patch is bright red, hot and very painful
symptom_narrative.severity_patient_description: the new patch is exquisitely painful; the leg is so heavy it limits her walking
symptom_narrative.location_as_patient_describes: whole right leg swollen; the new red hot patch is on the front of the shin
symptom_narrative.timing_pattern: chronic swelling with a new acute infected-looking patch over the last day
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_better: nothing much for the new patch
symptom_narrative.what_makes_it_worse: standing/weight-bearing; the patch is tender to any touch
symptom_narrative.associated_symptoms_volunteered: a low-grade fever; denies shaking chills/rigors or feeling systemically very unwell; no vomiting
symptom_narrative.previous_episodes: has had similar skin infections in this leg before, treated with antibiotics
symptom_narrative.functional_impact: mobility significantly restricted by the heavy swollen limb and now the painful patch

past_medical_history.condition_as_patient_states: long-standing swelling of the right leg (lymphoedema) after pelvic surgery 5 years ago
past_medical_history.how_managed: has compression garments (not currently worn) and has had antibiotics for previous skin infections

social_history_volunteered.relevant_life_context: lives alone; mobility limited by the swollen leg, raising fall/isolation risk

psychosocial_profile.hidden_agenda: worried about another infection and coping alone with limited mobility

communication_style.typical_message_style: describes the chronic and acute changes clearly

objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: self-measured low-grade temperature; no rigors reported

objective_data_offered.value: a bright red, hot, sharply-demarcated painful patch (~10 cm) on the right shin, on a chronically swollen leg
objective_data_offered.reliability_caveat: patient/video description; margins and extent need clinician confirmation
